title: Parta MCP Sample Project
description: Local mirror of a Parta course project. Source of truth for sync into Parta via the parta-sync skill.

$schema.description: Pointer to this JSON schema. Optional; helps IDEs validate project.json.

description.description: One-paragraph project description shown on the cover.

pages.description: Ordered list of pages. Order is preserved on sync — reordering here triggers move_editor_section calls.

name.description: Page title. Used as the section name in Parta.

description.description: Short summary of the page. Optional; used as the section subtitle when supported.

ref.description: Path (relative to project.json) to the page's markdown source file.
